slides.title: Opening and Motivation
slides.notes: Set context and goals. Do not deep dive yet.

slides.title: System Architecture
slides.notes: Walk through the signal flow left to right. Mention feedback loop.

slides.title: Safety and Reliability
slides.notes: Stress that command execution is gated before any slide control action.

slides.title: Live Demo
slides.notes: Speak naturally and let the prototype infer when to move.

slides.title: Wrap-up
slides.notes: Close with practical next steps: Keynote control integration and slide feedback sync.
